detailed_analysis: Opens with pattern-interrupt 'Stop!' and persistent value text to freeze scroll. Hands frame two bottles then reveal 2-for-1 offer. Ends with hard urgency + spoken yellow basket CTA. No face, minimal personality, pure offer + direct purchase path. Click-off risk at 4s if viewer tunes out supplement ads; completion driven by scarcity line at 8s.

detailed_analysis: Opens with strong story hook (creepy notes) that stops scroll, quickly pivots to car detailing pain points, then delivers highly visual thick-foam demo that creates desire. Ends with hard Bottom Funnel CTA naming exact price drop and directing to yellow basket. High retention via satisfying visuals and clear offer.
funnel_category_reason: Strongest sell moment is the explicit discount pitch (£13 on TikTok shop, was £30) plus direct call to tap the yellow basket at the end, making it a conversion/urgency push.
